arts.ttl: De Ligt bounces back from Netherlands nightmare in ‘really important’ Man Utd win
arts.sum: Matthijs de Ligt opened his account for Manchester United to help his new club earn their second win of the season over Southampton at St Mary’s Stadium on Saturday. The hosts dominated the early exchanges, but failed to find the net, even when they were awarded a penalty. Cameron Archer stepped up to the spot […] The post De Ligt bounces back from Netherlands nightmare in ‘really important’ Man Utd win first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Southampton 0-3 Man United PLAYER RATINGS: Who appears to have his 'mojo' back? Which defender had a 'nightmare'? And who was 'given the run around' by an 18-year-old?
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT ST MARY'S: Marcus Rashford broke his goalscoring duck and Matthijs de Ligt netted his first for his new club as Manchester United saw out a commanding 3-0 win against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ease past Southampton for much-needed victory
arts.sum: An early scare ended with a comfortable victory on the south coast for Erik ten Hag’s side.

arts.ttl: The stat that will encourage Ten Hag after Man Utd win at Southampton
arts.sum: First half goals from Matthijs de Ligt and Marcus Rashford ensured United never lost control despite an initial scare which saw Andre Onana save Cameron Archer ’s penalty after Southampton dominating the early proceedings. And the result provided United with just their second away Premier League clean sheet in 2024, with the first coming on the final day of last season against Brighton.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ease past Southampton for much-needed victory
arts.sum: An early scare ended with a comfortable victory on the south coast for Erik ten Hag’s side.

arts.ttl: Southampton 0-3 Man United: Highlights, man of the match, stats as De Ligt impresses
arts.sum: Matthijs de Ligt, Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho all got on the scoresheet as Manchester United sweep past Southampton at St Mary's.

arts.ttl: Man United cruise to a much-needed 3-0 win over Southampton as Matthijs de Ligt, Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho strike at St Mary's... but there were still scares along the way, writes CHRIS WHEELER
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER AT ST MARY'S STADIUM: Matthijs de Ligt, Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho scored to give Erik ten Hag a much-needed win.

arts.ttl: Man Utd quieten the noise with routine win at Southampton
arts.sum: Man Utd produced a professional performance to beat struggling Southampton 3-0 and once again ease the pressure on manager Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fate swings in chaotic 150-second spell vs Southampton - 5 talking points
arts.sum: SOUTHAMPTON 0-3 MAN UTD: Andre Onana's penalty save was the turning point in Manchester United's first victory since the opening day of the Premier League season

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd decide Casemiro future; Inter & Juventus hunt Van Dijk
arts.sum: Real Madrid ' s pursuit of Bayern Munich full-back Alphonso Davies is 'into the final stretch', with the 23-year-old expected to move to Spain next summer for free. Manchester United and Arsenal target Xavi Simons wants to move to the Premier League after concluding his season-long loan spell at RB Leipzig.
